## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content production, publishing workflows, and performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Glossary Push for Launch:** Prioritizing glossary pages for the upcoming Agentic AI launch. Ashur will review 10 AI-related terms today for publishing tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)
  - [**New Publishing Workflow:** The new glossary workflow requires adding the featured image last, as this action automatically publishes the page.](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [**Credibility Risk Identified:** A foundational article on MCP security was flagged as potentially inaccurate, risking Aembit's credibility. It will be sent back for a fact-checking review.](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
  - [**Organic Traffic Growth:** Organic traffic nearly doubled, signaling successful top-of-funnel discovery. A recent email campaign also drove 67 sessions to a key article.](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Review

  - [**Review Queue:**](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
      - [14 Glossary pages in "Ready2Review"](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
      - [24 Articles/Outlines in "Ready2Review"](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [**Glossary Page Production:**](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
      - [Ehtisham submitted 10 new topics and will submit 10 more today.](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
      - [**Workflow:** Add the featured image as the final step, as this action automatically publishes the page.](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
      - [**Formatting:** Use the "Active Directory" or "API Key" pages as templates to ensure consistent formatting.](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
      - [**Duplicates:** Avoid creating duplicate pages (e.g., "API Key"); add content to existing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [**Article Accuracy:**](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
      - [**Problem:** The article "Securing MCP server communications..." was flagged as potentially inaccurate on foundational MCP security concepts.](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
      - [**Risk:** Publishing inaccuracies on foundational topics could damage Aembit's credibility, even if product-specific claims are correct.](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)
      - [**Action:** Send the article back for a fact-checking review.](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
  - [**AI System Improvement:**](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
      - [Ehtisham's AI system is now successfully identifying the same phrasing issues that Ashur previously flagged.](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
      - [**Significance:** This improvement should reduce manual review time for Aembit's team.](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)

### Performance & Strategy

  - [**Organic Traffic:**](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
      - [Organic traffic nearly doubled last week, indicating successful top-of-funnel discovery.](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
      - [Engagement rate fell from 90% to 65%, which is expected with a traffic surge and signals new, less engaged users.](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [**Email Campaign Impact:**](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
      - [The monthly newsletter (sent to \~10k contacts) drove 67 sessions to the article "Securing AI Agents at LLM Workflows Without Secrets."](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
      - [This article received the most clicks (26) among the newsletter's three CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)
  - [**Compounding Growth Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
      - [New articles are now gaining traction, validating the strategy of increasing publishing volume (e.g., to 5 articles/week) to build a compounding baseline of traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
      - [**Rationale:** High-performing content from email/social promotion can also boost organic search rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/5LZ_KRQcBtvQrSWfyztSduQA6JRMzYgL?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
